title: Woodcutting 1 → 10
description: You may train Woodcutting up to level 10. You must reach 10 before opening another pack.

title: Mining 1 → 10
description: You may train Mining up to level 10. You must reach 10 before opening another pack.

title: On the Board
description: Complete 5 slayer tasks (manual).

title: Beefy Beginnings
description: Kill 50 cows (manual).
